overlay.instructionsHtml:
Left click: select tile
Drag: move camera
Arrow keys / WASD: navigate the map
Settings: inspect SEED-based topology and terrain parameters

character.title: Character
character.name: Arin Valen
character.metaHtml:
Level 7 Ranger
Region: Misty Valley
Status: Ready for mission

dialog.title: Dialogue
dialog.defaultText: SEED-based world generation is active. You can inspect the generated topology and infrastructure parameters from the settings menu.

choiceResults.north: You advanced north. Hill structure and transition corridors are being observed.
choiceResults.east: You moved toward the eastern region. Road and open terrain structure is more visible here.
choiceResults.south: You inspected the southern line. Water structures and environmental transitions may be concentrated here.
choiceResults.wait: You stay in place and continue evaluating topology parameters.

dialog.worldSummary: A new world has been generated. SEED: {{seed}} | Size: {{cols}} x {{rows}} | Hills: {{hills}} | Streams: {{streams}} | Roads: {{roads}}

settings.title: Settings and SEED Parameters
settings.note: These fields are derived only from the SEED and map size. Manual editing is disabled. When the same SEED and dimensions are entered, the application regenerates the same topology and terrain distribution.

These fields are derived only from the SEED and map size. Manual editing is disabled. When the same SEED and dimensions are entered, the application regenerates the same topology and terrain distribution.

logs.title: Application Logs
logs.settingsApplied: Settings applied. New SEED={{seed}}, new size={{cols}}x{{rows}}
logs.fileModeWarning: INFO: The application was opened through file://. Due to Chrome security policies, you may see a file origin warning in DevTools. For the cleanest execution, use a local server.
logs.staticResourceFailed: ERROR: Static resource could not be loaded.

webgl.notSupported: WebGL could not be initialized. The browser or GPU may not support this feature.
